CustomField.description:
Completed by the line manager during or after the end of year review with the individual, a short summary of progress against objectives and general comments on performance and development over the year.
Reviewer comments may be amended after the end of year review on agreement between individual and line manager - comments should only be shared outside of that conversation once they have been agreed.
Ideas or actions for next year may be suggested here, but should be formalised in the following years Expectations Exchange
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Completed by the line manager during or after the end of year review with the individual, a short summary of progress against objectives and general comments on performance and development over the year.
CustomField.label: End-of-Year Review - Reviewer Comments
